title: SQL: exec query with join condition results in "SQLException:SQLengine:Program contains errors"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE b (a_id INT, b_value VARCHAR(50), c_date DATE);
INSERT INTO b (a_id, b_value, c_date) VALUES (1, 'test1', '2023-01-01'), (2, 'test2', NULL), (3, 'test3', '2023-03-15');
CREATE TABLE c (d_id INT PRIMARY KEY, e_value FLOAT CHECK (e_value >= 0));
INSERT INTO c (d_id, e_value) VALUES (1, 10.5), (2, -5.0), (3, NULL);

SELECT b_group.a_id, b_group.total, c_group.total_value FROM (SELECT a_id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM b GROUP BY a_id) AS b_group LEFT JOIN (SELECT d_id, SUM(e_value) AS total_value FROM c WHERE e_value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d_id) AS c_group ON b_group.a_id = c_group.d_id;
key_bug_features: exec query with join condition in SQL
